queries.sql: SELECT load_tier, COUNT(*) AS cnt, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT), 0.95) AS p95_tput FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN load_factor < 30.0 THEN 'light' WHEN load_factor < 65.0 THEN 'moderate' ELSE 'heavy' END AS load_tier, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND load_factor IS NOT NULL) sub GROUP BY load_tier ORDER BY load_tier ASC

WITH total_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), auto_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS auto_events FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_mode = 'auto' GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT tc.facility_zone, tc.total_events, COALESCE(ac.auto_events, 0) AS auto_events, ROUND(CAST(COALESCE(ac.auto_events, 0) AS FLOAT) / CAST(tc.total_events AS FLOAT) * 100.0, 2) AS auto_pct FROM total_counts tc LEFT JOIN auto_counts ac ON tc.facility_zone = ac.facility_zone ORDER BY auto_pct DESC
SELECT pallet_id, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC

SELECT derived.facility_zone, derived.avg_tput, derived.cnt FROM (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone) AS derived WHERE derived.avg_tput > 300.0 ORDER BY derived.avg_tput DESC

SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) AS zone_avg FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sorter_model ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, rn FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY sorter_model, rn

WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), mode_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS mode_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), ranked_modes AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, mode_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY mode_cnt DESC) AS rn FROM mode_stats) SELECT zs.facility_zone, zs.cnt, zs.avg_tput, zs.avg_temp, rm.operation_mode AS top_mode, rm.mode_cnt FROM zone_stats zs JOIN ranked_modes rm ON zs.facility_zone = rm.facility_zone AND rm.rn = 1 ORDER BY zs.avg_tput DESC

WITH base AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND load_factor IS NOT NULL), stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS mu, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate * throughput_rate) - AVG(throughput_rate) * AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS var_tput FROM base GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) SELECT b._timestamp, b.facility_zone, b.operation_mode, b.throughput_rate, s.mu, s.var_tput, ROUND((b.throughput_rate - s.mu) * (b.throughput_rate - s.mu) / NULLIF(s.var_tput, 0), 3) AS sq_dev_ratio FROM base b JOIN stats s ON b.facility_zone = s.facility_zone AND b.operation_mode = s.operation_mode WHERE s.var_tput > 0 ORDER BY sq_dev_ratio DESC LIMIT 15

WITH ranked AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL), top3 AS (SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3) SELECT 'top' AS segment, facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn FROM top3 UNION ALL SELECT 'bottom' AS segment, ranked.facility_zone, ranked.pallet_id, ranked.throughput_rate, ranked.rn FROM ranked WHERE ranked.rn > (SELECT MAX(rn) - 3 FROM ranked r2 WHERE r2.facility_zone = ranked.facility_zone) ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, segment ASC, rn ASC

WITH lane_activity AS (SELECT conveyor_lane, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS events FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY conveyor_lane, facility_zone), global_avg AS (SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(events AS FLOAT)), 2) AS avg_events FROM lane_activity), above_avg AS (SELECT la.conveyor_lane, la.facility_zone, la.events, ga.avg_events, ROUND(CAST(la.events AS FLOAT) - ga.avg_events, 2) AS diff_from_avg FROM lane_activity la CROSS JOIN global_avg ga WHERE la.events > ga.avg_events) SELECT * FROM above_avg ORDER BY diff_from_avg DESC

WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS zone_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id, t1.facility_zone, t1.throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.facility_zone ORDER BY t1.throughput_rate DESC) AS rank_by_zone, zs.zone_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" t1 JOIN zone_stats zs ON t1.facility_zone = zs.facility_zone WHERE t1.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t1.facility_zone ASC, rank_by_zone ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, avg_tput, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY avg_tput DESC) AS rnk FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) inner_agg) ranked_agg WHERE rnk <= 2 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rnk ASC

SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id AS pallet_a, t2.pallet_id AS pallet_b, t1.facility_zone, ABS(t1.throughput_rate - t2.throughput_rate) AS tput_diff FROM "{stream}" t1 JOIN "{stream}" t2 ON t1.facility_zone = t2.facility_zone AND t1._timestamp < t2._timestamp AND t1.pallet_id != t2.pallet_id WHERE t1.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND t2.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tput_diff ASC LIMIT 12

WITH temp_classified AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN cell_temp >= 22.0 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS temp_class FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL), class_summary AS (SELECT facility_zone, temp_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp FROM temp_classified GROUP BY facility_zone, temp_class), pivot AS (SELECT facility_zone, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='HIGH' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS high_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='MEDIUM' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS med_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='LOW' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS low_cnt FROM class_summary GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT *, ROUND(CAST(high_cnt AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(high_cnt + med_cnt + low_cnt, 0) * 100.0, 2) AS high_pct FROM pivot ORDER BY high_pct DESC

SELECT t1.facility_zone, t1.sorter_model, t1.avg_tput, t1.avg_load FROM (SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model) t1 WHERE t1.avg_tput > (SELECT ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate) * 0.8, 2) FROM "{stream}") AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.charge_remaining < 20.0) ORDER BY t1.avg_tput DESC

WITH mode_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS peer_count FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), zone_load AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS zone_avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id, t1.facility_zone, t1.throughput_rate, t1.operation_mode, t1.cell_temp, mc.peer_count, zl.zone_avg_load FROM "{stream}" t1 JOIN mode_counts mc ON t1.facility_zone = mc.facility_zone AND t1.operation_mode = mc.operation_mode JOIN zone_load zl ON t1.facility_zone = zl.facility_zone WHERE mc.peer_count >= 2 ORDER BY t1.facility_zone ASC, t1.throughput_rate DESC

WITH chain_builder AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, runtime_hours, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY runtime_hours ASC) AS seq, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone) AS zone_cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL), chains AS (SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, runtime_hours, seq, zone_cnt, CASE WHEN seq < zone_cnt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_next FROM chain_builder) SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS chain_count, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_hours FROM chains GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY chain_count DESC

WITH extracted AS (SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, array_extract(regexp_match(event_detail, 'batch ([A-Z0-9]+)'), 1) AS batch_id, array_extract(regexp_match(event_detail, 'segment ([0-9]+)'), 1) AS segment_nbr, array_extract(regexp_match(event_detail, 'track ([A-Za-z0-9-]+)'), 1) AS track_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE event_detail LIKE '%sorter batch%'), with_batch_flag AS (SELECT _timestamp, batch_id, sorter_model, segment_nbr, track_id, CASE WHEN array_extract(regexp_match(track_id, '([A-Z]+)'), 1) = 'TRK' THEN 'batch' ELSE 'non batch' END AS is_batch, concat('srt', lpad(CAST(segment_nbr AS VARCHAR), 5, '0'), '#', track_id) AS sorterWithTrackId FROM extracted), recovered_status AS (SELECT wbf.batch_id, wbf.sorter_model, wbf.segment_nbr, wbf.track_id, wbf.is_batch, wbf.sorterWithTrackId, CASE WHEN ack.ack_detail IS NOT NULL AND ack.ack_detail != '' THEN 'received' ELSE 'notreceived' END AS ack_status FROM with_batch_flag wbf LEFT JOIN (SELECT ack_detail FROM "{stream}" WHERE ack_detail IS NOT NULL AND ack_detail != '' AND str_match_ignore_case(ack_detail, 'ACK batch')) ack ON ack.ack_detail LIKE concat('%batchIdList:%', wbf.batch_id, '%') WHERE wbf.is_batch = 'batch') SELECT array_agg('batch_id-' || batch_id || ', sorter_model-' || sorter_model || ', segment_nbr-' || segment_nbr || ', track_id-' || track_id || ', is_batch-' || is_batch || ', sorterWithTrackId-' || sorterWithTrackId || ', ack_status-' || ack_status) AS results, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM recovered_status HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT dependency, statuscode FROM (SELECT array_extract(regexp_match(log_message, 'responseCode:\\W(?<statuscode>[^,]+)'), 1) AS statuscode, array_extract(regexp_match(log_message, 'name: [A-Z]+\\W(https:\\/\\/[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+\\/[a-zA-Z0-9\\/-]+)'), 1) AS dependency FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(log_message, 'service.api.warehouse.com')) GROUP BY dependency, statuscode

expected.note: Subquery in FROM with regexp named groups, str_match_ignore_case

queries.sql: SELECT page_slug, "key", SUM(cnt) AS cnt FROM (   SELECT page_slug, visitor_session_id AS "key", COUNT(*) AS cnt   FROM "{stream}"   WHERE (match_all('warehouse') AND page_slug = 'itemPage')     AND uri_path LIKE '%api%'     AND (visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL AND visitor_session_id != 'null')     AND (lower(graphql_operation) IN (       'updateitems','placeorder','verifypayment','updatecart','createaccount'     ))     AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%bot%'     AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%test%'   GROUP BY "key", page_slug, geo_country, geo_user_type   HAVING ((geo_user_type IS NULL OR geo_user_type != 'hosting') AND geo_country = 'US' AND COUNT(*) > 1)     OR ((geo_user_type = 'hosting' OR geo_country != 'US') AND COUNT(*) > 0) ) sub GROUP BY page_slug, "key" ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT page_slug, "key", SUM(cnt) AS cnt
FROM (
  SELECT page_slug, visitor_session_id AS "key", COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE (match_all('warehouse') AND page_slug = 'itemPage')
    AND uri_path LIKE '%api%'
    AND (visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL AND visitor_session_id != 'null')
    AND (lower(graphql_operation) IN (
      'updateitems','placeorder','verifypayment','updatecart','createaccount',
      'getinventory','createcontract','createcreditcard','createdeliveryaddress',
      'updatequantity','movesfltocart'
    ))
    AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%bot%'
    AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%curl%'
  GROUP BY "key", page_slug, geo_country, geo_user_type
  HAVING ((geo_user_type IS NULL OR geo_user_type != 'hosting') AND geo_country = 'US' AND COUNT(*) > 1)
    OR ((geo_user_type = 'hosting' OR geo_country != 'US') AND COUNT(*) > 0)
) sub
GROUP BY page_slug, "key"
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT graphql_operation, COALESCE(visitor_session_id, 'N/A') AS visitor_session_id, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE graphql_operation = 'verifyPayment'
  AND (passthrough_flag <> 'true')
  AND (passthrough_flag <> '')
  AND (passthrough_flag IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((visitor_session_id NOT IN ('sess_001', 'sess_003') OR visitor_session_id IS NULL))
  AND ((NOT (LOWER(user_agent_str) LIKE 'curl%') OR user_agent_str IS NULL))
  AND (info_tag IS NULL OR info_tag NOT LIKE '%NonexistentPattern%')
GROUP BY graphql_operation, visitor_session_id
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 1)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH base AS (
  SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, sorter_model,
    operation_mode, throughput_rate, load_factor, cell_temp
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE load_factor > 10.0
    AND throughput_rate >= 100.0
),
aggregated AS (
  SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, operation_mode,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
    MAX(load_factor) AS max_load,
    MIN(cell_temp) AS min_temp
  FROM base
  GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model, operation_mode
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
)
SELECT a.facility_zone, a.sorter_model, a.operation_mode,
  a.cnt, a.avg_throughput, a.max_load, a.min_temp
FROM aggregated a
ORDER BY a.avg_throughput DESC, a.cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, operation_mode,
    throughput_rate, load_factor,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY facility_zone
      ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE load_factor > 20.0
)
SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
  MAX(load_factor) AS max_load
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 5
GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY avg_throughput DESC

WITH combined_data AS (
  SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, 'high_tput' AS source
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE throughput_rate >= 500.0 AND load_factor > 20.0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, 'low_tput' AS source
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE throughput_rate < 200.0 AND load_factor > 20.0
)
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, source,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
  AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load
FROM combined_data
GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model, source
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT facility_zone, op_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(avg_tput) AS overall_avg_tput,
  SUM(cnt_rows) AS total_rows
FROM (
  SELECT facility_zone, op_mode,
    AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_tput,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt_rows
  FROM (
    SELECT facility_zone,
      CASE
        WHEN operation_mode = 'auto' THEN 'AUTO'
        WHEN operation_mode = 'manual' THEN 'MANUAL'
        ELSE 'OTHER'
      END AS op_mode,
      throughput_rate, load_factor
    FROM "{stream}"
    WHERE load_factor > 10.0
  ) inner_q
  GROUP BY facility_zone, op_mode
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
) mid_q
GROUP BY facility_zone, op_mode
ORDER BY overall_avg_tput DESC

WITH platform_events AS (SELECT _timestamp, (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE 'Other' END) AS platform, action_category, exception_message, error_code, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east') SELECT platform, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, COUNT(CASE WHEN exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 1 END) AS errors FROM platform_events GROUP BY platform

WITH enriched AS (SELECT _timestamp, concat(coalesce(page_url, page_slug), '::', action_category) AS event_path, coalesce(exception_message, error_code) AS issue, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') SELECT event_path, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM enriched WHERE issue IS NOT NULL GROUP BY event_path ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH filtered AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IN ('warehouse-north', 'warehouse-south') AND build_version NOT IN ('v1.0.0', 'v1.1.2') AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation') AND page_slug = 'itemPage') SELECT action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency FROM filtered GROUP BY action_category

WITH error_messages AS (SELECT _timestamp, (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 0 THEN exception_message ELSE error_code END) AS display_error, action_category, page_slug, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') SELECT display_error, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM error_messages GROUP BY display_error ORDER BY cnt DESC

results: NetworkException: connection to batch sync failed
SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA

queries.sql: SELECT duration_bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT (CASE WHEN ((MAX(_timestamp) - MIN(_timestamp)) / 60000000) < 60 THEN 'under_1min' WHEN ((MAX(_timestamp) - MIN(_timestamp)) / 60000000) < 120 THEN '1_2min' ELSE 'over_2min' END) AS duration_bucket FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' GROUP BY visitor_session_id) GROUP BY duration_bucket

WITH error_set AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' OR upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E00%' OR error_code LIKE '%E00%' OR event_detail LIKE '%fail%') SELECT action_category, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM error_set GROUP BY action_category, page_slug ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT error_type, COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT (CASE WHEN exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 'exception' WHEN upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E%' THEN 'upstream' WHEN error_code LIKE '%E00%' THEN 'coded' ELSE 'other' END) AS error_type FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') GROUP BY error_type

WITH source_map AS (SELECT _timestamp, coalesce(page_url, resource_path) AS origin, action_category, action_subcategory, visitor_session_id, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation') SELECT origin, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency FROM source_map GROUP BY origin ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH clean_data AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE error_code NOT IN ('E002', 'E004', 'E005') AND exception_message NOT LIKE '%Timeout%' AND action_category NOT IN ('interaction', 'navigation') AND info_tag IS NULL) SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM clean_data GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH metrics AS (SELECT visitor_session_id, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY visitor_session_id), navigations AS (SELECT visitor_session_id, COUNT(*) AS nav_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' GROUP BY visitor_session_id) SELECT COALESCE(m.visitor_session_id, n.visitor_session_id) AS user_id, COALESCE(m.event_count, 0) AS metrics, COALESCE(n.nav_count, 0) AS navigations FROM metrics m FULL OUTER JOIN navigations n ON m.visitor_session_id = n.visitor_session_id

WITH classified AS (SELECT *, (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE 'Other' END) AS platform_group FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east') SELECT platform_group, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM classified GROUP BY platform_group, page_slug ORDER BY platform_group, cnt DESC

WITH event_class AS (SELECT *, (CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'normal' WHEN latency_ms < 1000 THEN 'slow' ELSE 'degraded' END) AS speed, (CASE WHEN response_code = 200 THEN 'ok' WHEN response_code >= 500 THEN 'server_error' WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 'client_error' ELSE 'unknown' END) AS outcome FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0) SELECT speed, outcome, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_class GROUP BY speed, outcome ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

WITH filtered AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage', 'checkoutPage') AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation', 'interaction')) SELECT page_slug, action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM filtered GROUP BY page_slug, action_category HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

WITH display AS (SELECT concat(page_slug, '/', action_category) AS page_action, coalesce(exception_message, error_code, 'none') AS issue, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') SELECT page_action, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM display GROUP BY page_action ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH raw_counts AS (SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' GROUP BY page_slug), error_counts AS (SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS errors FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY page_slug) SELECT COALESCE(r.page_slug, e.page_slug) AS page, COALESCE(r.total, 0) AS total_nav, COALESCE(e.errors, 0) AS total_errors FROM raw_counts r LEFT JOIN error_counts e ON r.page_slug = e.page_slug ORDER BY total_nav DESC

WITH suspect_events AS (SELECT DISTINCT visitor_session_id, action_category, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' OR upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E%' OR error_code LIKE '%E00%' OR event_detail LIKE '%fail%') SELECT action_category, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM suspect_events GROUP BY action_category, page_slug ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH error_data AS (SELECT (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 0 THEN exception_message ELSE error_code END) AS error_label, action_category, page_slug, visitor_session_id, info_tag FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') SELECT error_label, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, COUNT(CASE WHEN info_tag IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS untagged FROM error_data GROUP BY error_label ORDER BY cnt DESC

results: NetworkException: connection to batch sync failed

queries.sql: WITH platform_data AS (SELECT (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE os_platform END) AS platform, action_category, error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation')) SELECT platform, COUNT(*) AS total, (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN error_code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) AS error_rate FROM platform_data GROUP BY platform

WITH latency_data AS (SELECT coalesce(page_slug, 'unknown') AS page, latency_ms, response_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms BETWEEN 50 AND 2000) SELECT page, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) AS errors FROM latency_data GROUP BY page

WITH clean AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name NOT IN ('warehouse-south', 'warehouse-central') AND error_code NOT IN ('E002', 'E004')  AND build_version NOT IN ('v1.0.0')) SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency FROM clean GROUP BY page_slug

WITH enriched AS (SELECT _timestamp, coalesce(page_url, resource_path, endpoint_path, page_slug) AS effective_url, coalesce(exception_message, upstream_error_code, error_code) AS issue_text, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') SELECT effective_url, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN issue_text LIKE '%Exception%' OR issue_text LIKE '%UP-E%' THEN 1 END) AS issues FROM enriched GROUP BY effective_url ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT component_name, error_code FROM (SELECT component_name, error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message IS NOT NULL) WHERE error_code IN ('E001', 'E003', 'E005')) GROUP BY component_name

WITH android_item_page AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(os_platform, 'Android') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage') AND action_category IN ('navigation', 'performanceMetric', 'interaction') AND exception_message IS NOT NULL) SELECT error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM android_item_page GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH page_stats AS (SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY page_slug) SELECT page_slug, cnt, avg_lat FROM page_stats WHERE avg_lat > 100 AND cnt > 2 ORDER BY avg_lat DESC

WITH level1 AS (SELECT _timestamp, action_category, page_slug, latency_ms, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0), level2 AS (SELECT visitor_session_id, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM level1 GROUP BY visitor_session_id), level3 AS (SELECT l1._timestamp, l1.page_slug, l2.avg_lat FROM level1 l1 INNER JOIN level2 l2 ON l1.visitor_session_id = l2.visitor_session_id) SELECT page_slug, ROUND(AVG(avg_lat), 1) AS overall_avg, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM level3 GROUP BY page_slug ORDER BY overall_avg DESC, page_slug ASC

WITH base AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, throughput_rate, load_factor, facility_zone FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'), zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT)) AS zone_avg FROM base GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT b.pallet_id, b.throughput_rate, b.load_factor, ROUND(z.zone_avg, 1) AS zone_avg FROM base b INNER JOIN zone_stats z ON b.facility_zone = z.facility_zone WHERE b.throughput_rate > z.zone_avg ORDER BY b.throughput_rate DESC, b.pallet_id ASC LIMIT 10

WITH perf AS (SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, page_slug, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'), nav AS (SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation') SELECT DISTINCT p.visitor_session_id, p.page_slug AS perf_page, n.page_slug AS nav_page FROM perf p LEFT JOIN nav n ON p.visitor_session_id = n.visitor_session_id ORDER BY p.visitor_session_id ASC, p.page_slug ASC LIMIT 15

WITH categorized AS (SELECT *, (CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'slow' END) AS speed FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0) SELECT speed, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)), 1) AS avg_lat, COUNT(DISTINCT page_slug) AS unique_pages FROM categorized GROUP BY speed ORDER BY (CASE WHEN speed = 'fast' THEN 1 WHEN speed = 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) ASC

WITH ordered AS (SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, page_slug, latency_ms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY visitor_session_id ORDER BY _timestamp) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' AND visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT visitor_session_id, page_slug AS first_visit_page, _timestamp FROM ordered WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY visitor_session_id ASC

WITH err AS (SELECT _timestamp, component_name, error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL) SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS err_cnt, array_agg(error_code) AS codes FROM err GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY err_cnt DESC, component_name ASC LIMIT 10

WITH dups AS (SELECT visitor_session_id, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY visitor_session_id, page_slug HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) SELECT d.visitor_session_id, d.page_slug, d.cnt FROM dups d ORDER BY d.cnt DESC, d.visitor_session_id ASC, d.page_slug ASC LIMIT 10

WITH ranked AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, throughput_rate, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS tput_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND throughput_rate > 0) SELECT pallet_id, throughput_rate, tput_rank FROM ranked WHERE tput_rank <= 5 ORDER BY tput_rank ASC

WITH src AS (SELECT _timestamp, org_name, action_category, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0), agg AS (SELECT org_name, action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)), 1) AS avg_lat FROM src GROUP BY org_name, action_category) SELECT org_name, action_category, cnt, avg_lat FROM agg WHERE org_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cnt DESC, org_name ASC, action_category ASC LIMIT 12

WITH device_data AS (SELECT _timestamp, device_type, os_platform, action_category, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL), mobile_only AS (SELECT * FROM device_data WHERE device_type = 'Mobile' AND os_platform LIKE '%Android%'), desktop_only AS (SELECT * FROM device_data WHERE device_type = 'Computer') SELECT 'mobile_android' AS source, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mobile_only UNION ALL SELECT 'desktop' AS source, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM desktop_only ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH agg AS (SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS total_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 AND page_slug IS NOT NULL GROUP BY page_slug), stats AS (SELECT page_slug, cnt, ROUND(total_lat / NULLIF(cnt, 0), 1) AS avg_lat FROM agg) SELECT page_slug, cnt, avg_lat FROM stats WHERE avg_lat > 50 ORDER BY avg_lat DESC, page_slug ASC

WITH tagged AS (SELECT *, concat(COALESCE(page_slug, 'unknown'), ':', COALESCE(action_subcategory, 'unknown')) AS tag FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IS NOT NULL) SELECT tag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tagged GROUP BY tag ORDER BY cnt DESC, tag ASC LIMIT 10

WITH seq AS (SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, page_slug, LAG(page_slug) OVER (PARTITION BY visitor_session_id ORDER BY _timestamp) AS prev_page FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IN ('navigation', 'interaction') AND visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT visitor_session_id, prev_page, page_slug AS current_page, _timestamp FROM seq WHERE prev_page IS NOT NULL ORDER BY visitor_session_id ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 15

WITH nums AS (SELECT _timestamp, latency_ms, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0) SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)), 1) AS avg_lat, ROUND(AVG(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT)), 1) AS avg_tput, ROUND(CORR(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT), CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT)), 4) AS lat_tput_corr FROM nums

WITH error_summary AS (SELECT org_name, error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE error_code IS NOT NULL AND org_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY org_name, error_code), ranked AS (SELECT org_name, error_code, cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY org_name ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM error_summary) SELECT org_name, error_code, cnt FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY org_name ASC, rn ASC

WITH endpoint_stats AS (SELECT spath(request_payload, 'message.endpoint') AS endpoint, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(request_payload, 'endpoint') GROUP BY endpoint ) SELECT endpoint, cnt FROM endpoint_stats WHERE cnt > 0 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

expected.note: spath() is OO-specific; DuckDB cannot replicate

queries.sql: WITH resolved AS (SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(org_name, site_name, region_code) AS tenant, COALESCE(latency_ms, lcp_micros) AS response_time, COALESCE(response_code, 0) AS status FROM "{stream}" ) SELECT tenant, COUNT(*) AS reqs, AVG(CAST(response_time AS FLOAT)) AS avg_rt, SUM(CASE WHEN status >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errors FROM resolved GROUP BY tenant ORDER BY reqs DESC LIMIT 10

WITH base AS (SELECT component_name, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY component_name ) SELECT component_name, avg_lat, CASE WHEN avg_lat < 500 THEN 'fast' WHEN avg_lat < 1500 THEN 'moderate' ELSE 'slow' END AS perf_tier FROM base ORDER BY avg_lat DESC

SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > (SELECT AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) FROM "{stream}") GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY avg_lat DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" t3 WHERE t3.facility_zone = t2.facility_zone)) AS avg_load_above_avg_tput FROM "{stream}" t1 ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 5

SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 1) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone HAVING AVG(throughput_rate) > (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) * 0.5 FROM "{stream}") ORDER BY avg_tput DESC

WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_tput, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), high_tput AS (SELECT facility_zone, avg_tput, avg_load FROM zone_stats WHERE avg_tput > 300), low_load AS (SELECT facility_zone, avg_tput, avg_load FROM zone_stats WHERE avg_load < 50) SELECT h.facility_zone, h.avg_tput, l.avg_load FROM high_tput h JOIN low_load l ON h.facility_zone = l.facility_zone ORDER BY h.avg_tput DESC
SELECT pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone = 'ZONE-1' INTERSECT SELECT pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone = 'ZONE-2' ORDER BY pallet_id
SELECT pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone = 'ZONE-1' EXCEPT SELECT pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone = 'ZONE-2' ORDER BY pallet_id

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, throughput_rate, (SELECT MAX(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone) AS zone_max_tput FROM "{stream}" t1 ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT DISTINCT facility_zone FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.throughput_rate > 800) ORDER BY facility_zone

WITH combined_zones AS (SELECT pallet_id, facility_zone, 'high' AS category FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 500 UNION ALL SELECT pallet_id, facility_zone, 'low' AS category FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate <= 500) SELECT category, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM combined_zones GROUP BY category, facility_zone ORDER BY category, facility_zone

WITH base AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}"), zone_avgs AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 1) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 1) AS avg_load FROM base GROUP BY facility_zone), ranked AS (SELECT facility_zone, avg_tput, avg_load, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_tput DESC) AS rn FROM zone_avgs) SELECT facility_zone, avg_tput, avg_load, rn FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY rn
SELECT DISTINCT org_name FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.org_name = t1.org_name AND re_match(t2.error_code, 'E00[5-9]')) ORDER BY org_name

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone IN (SELECT facility_zone FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor > (SELECT AVG(load_factor) FROM "{stream}"))) ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

WITH pairs AS (SELECT a.pallet_id AS p1, b.pallet_id AS p2, a.facility_zone FROM "{stream}" a JOIN "{stream}" b ON a.facility_zone = b.facility_zone AND a.pallet_id < b.pallet_id) SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS pair_count FROM pairs GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone

SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS zone_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.throughput_rate > 500) AS high_tput_count FROM "{stream}" t1 GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone

WITH numbered AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY _timestamp) AS rn FROM "{stream}"), latest AS (SELECT facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM numbered WHERE rn <= 3) SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 1) AS avg_recent_tput FROM latest GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone

SELECT zone, MAX(tput) AS peak_tput FROM (SELECT facility_zone AS zone, throughput_rate AS tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(operation_mode, 'auto|hybrid')) AS sub GROUP BY zone ORDER BY peak_tput DESC
SELECT DISTINCT t1.org_name FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.org_name = t1.org_name AND t2.facility_zone = 'ZONE-1') ORDER BY org_name

WITH raw AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}"), hourly AS (SELECT facility_zone, histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_tput, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load FROM raw GROUP BY facility_zone, _time), summary AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(avg_tput), 1) AS overall_tput, ROUND(AVG(avg_load), 1) AS overall_load FROM hourly GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT facility_zone, overall_tput, overall_load FROM summary ORDER BY overall_tput DESC

WITH errors AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(exception_message, 'Exception|Error|Overflow')), classified AS (SELECT facility_zone, CASE WHEN re_match(error_code, 'E00[1-4]') THEN 'minor' ELSE 'major' END AS severity FROM errors) SELECT facility_zone, severity, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM classified GROUP BY facility_zone, severity ORDER BY facility_zone, severity

WITH max_tput AS (SELECT facility_zone, MAX(throughput_rate) AS max_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT t._timestamp, t.facility_zone, t.throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" t JOIN max_tput m ON t.facility_zone = m.facility_zone AND t.throughput_rate = m.max_rate ORDER BY t._timestamp LIMIT 10

WITH cte1 AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, operation_mode, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 100), cte2 AS (SELECT cte1.*, AVG(cte1.throughput_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY cte1.facility_zone) AS zone_avg FROM cte1), cte3 AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN throughput_rate > zone_avg THEN 'above_avg' ELSE 'below_avg' END AS perf_tier FROM cte2) SELECT perf_tier, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load FROM cte3 GROUP BY perf_tier ORDER BY cnt DESC

WITH base AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY component_name ORDER BY latency_ms DESC) AS rn FROM base), top3 AS (SELECT component_name, latency_ms, rn FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3) SELECT component_name, AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_top3_lat, COUNT(*) AS top3_cnt FROM top3 GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY avg_top3_lat DESC

WITH cte1 AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), cte2 AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate2 FROM "{stream2}" GROUP BY facility_zone), cte3 AS (SELECT c1.facility_zone, c1.avg_rate, c1.avg_load, c2.avg_rate2, c1.avg_rate / NULLIF(c2.avg_rate2, 0) AS ratio FROM cte1 c1 LEFT JOIN cte2 c2 ON c1.facility_zone = c2.facility_zone) SELECT * FROM cte3 ORDER BY ratio DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate, g.global_avg_rate FROM "{stream}", (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) AS global_avg_rate FROM "{stream}") g GROUP BY facility_zone, g.global_avg_rate ORDER BY avg_rate DESC

SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, g.global_avg_lat FROM "{stream}", (SELECT AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS global_avg_lat  FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL) g WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component_name, g.global_avg_lat ORDER BY avg_lat DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.component_name, a.latency_ms, (SELECT AVG(CAST(b.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) FROM "{stream2}" b WHERE b.component_name = a.component_name) AS avg_in_other_stream FROM "{stream}" a WHERE a.latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.latency_ms DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a._timestamp, a.facility_zone, a.throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" a WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.facility_zone = a.facility_zone AND b.throughput_rate > a.throughput_rate AND b._timestamp > a._timestamp) ORDER BY a._timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.component_name, a.region_code, a.latency_ms FROM "{stream}" a WHERE a.latency_ms > (SELECT AVG(CAST(b.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.region_code = a.region_code) ORDER BY a.latency_ms DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.pallet_id, a.facility_zone, a.load_factor FROM "{stream}" a WHERE a.load_factor = (SELECT MAX(b.load_factor) FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.facility_zone = a.facility_zone) ORDER BY a.facility_zone, a.pallet_id LIMIT 10

SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate FROM "{stream}", (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) AS global_avg FROM "{stream}") g GROUP BY facility_zone, g.global_avg HAVING AVG(throughput_rate) > g.global_avg ORDER BY avg_rate DESC

SELECT component_name, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component_name HAVING AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) > (SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) FROM "{stream}") ORDER BY avg_lat DESC LIMIT 10

WITH paired AS (SELECT a.facility_zone AS zone_a, b.facility_zone AS zone_b, a.throughput_rate AS rate_a, b.throughput_rate AS rate_b FROM "{stream}" a JOIN "{stream2}" b ON a.facility_zone < b.facility_zone) SELECT zone_a, zone_b, AVG(rate_a) AS avg_a, AVG(rate_b) AS avg_b, AVG(rate_a + rate_b) AS combined_avg FROM paired GROUP BY zone_a, zone_b ORDER BY combined_avg DESC LIMIT 10

WITH high_rate AS (SELECT pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 500), low_rate AS (SELECT pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate < 200), combined AS (SELECT *, 'high' AS tier FROM high_rate UNION ALL SELECT *, 'low' AS tier FROM low_rate) SELECT tier, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate FROM combined GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier

SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" a WHERE throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.facility_zone = a.facility_zone AND b.facility_zone IN (SELECT facility_zone FROM "{stream2}" WHERE load_factor > 50)) ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT component_name, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, COUNT(*) AS cnt, (SELECT MAX(latency_ms) FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.component_name = a.component_name) AS max_lat, (SELECT MIN(latency_ms) FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.component_name = a.component_name) AS min_lat FROM "{stream}" a WHERE a.latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY avg_lat DESC LIMIT 10

WITH zone_baseline AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS baseline_rate, STDDEV(throughput_rate) AS std_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT a.facility_zone, a.pallet_id, a.throughput_rate, zb.baseline_rate, zb.std_rate, a.throughput_rate - zb.baseline_rate AS deviation FROM "{stream}" a JOIN zone_baseline zb ON a.facility_zone = zb.facility_zone WHERE a.throughput_rate > zb.baseline_rate + zb.std_rate ORDER BY deviation DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.pallet_id, a.facility_zone, a.throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" a WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.facility_zone = a.facility_zone AND b.throughput_rate > a.throughput_rate AND b._timestamp > a._timestamp) ORDER BY a.facility_zone, a.throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 10

WITH base AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, component_name, throughput_rate, latency_ms FROM "{stream}"), zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_tput, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM base GROUP BY facility_zone), global_stats AS (SELECT AVG(avg_tput) AS global_avg_tput, AVG(avg_lat) AS global_avg_lat FROM zone_stats) SELECT zs.facility_zone, zs.avg_tput, zs.avg_lat, CASE WHEN zs.avg_tput > gs.global_avg_tput THEN 'above_global' ELSE 'below_global' END AS tput_vs_global, CASE WHEN zs.avg_lat < gs.global_avg_lat THEN 'faster_than_global' ELSE 'slower_than_global' END AS lat_vs_global FROM zone_stats zs CROSS JOIN global_stats gs ORDER BY zs.facility_zone

SELECT org_name, region_code, avg_lat, rn FROM (SELECT org_name, region_code, avg_lat, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_code ORDER BY avg_lat ASC) AS rn FROM (SELECT org_name, region_code, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL AND org_name IS NOT NULL AND region_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY org_name, region_code) mid) outer_q WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY region_code, rn LIMIT 12

SELECT sq.facility_zone, sq.mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(sq.total_rate) AS total_rate FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode AS mode, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) sq GROUP BY sq.facility_zone, sq.mode ORDER BY total_rate DESC LIMIT 12

WITH tagged AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN throughput_rate >= 500 THEN 'high' WHEN throughput_rate >= 300 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS perf_class FROM "{stream}") SELECT facility_zone, perf_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load, AVG(cell_temp) AS avg_temp FROM tagged GROUP BY facility_zone, perf_class ORDER BY facility_zone, perf_class

WITH self_joined AS (SELECT a.facility_zone, a.pallet_id AS pallet_a, b.pallet_id AS pallet_b, a.throughput_rate AS rate_a, b.throughput_rate AS rate_b FROM "{stream}" a JOIN "{stream}" b ON a.facility_zone = b.facility_zone AND a._timestamp < b._timestamp) SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS pair_cnt, AVG(CAST(rate_a AS FLOAT) + CAST(rate_b AS FLOAT)) AS avg_pair_rate FROM self_joined GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY pair_cnt DESC

WITH cte1 AS (SELECT component_name, region_code, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component_name, region_code), cte2 AS (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_lat DESC) AS global_rank FROM cte1) SELECT * FROM cte2 WHERE global_rank <= 3 ORDER BY global_rank
SELECT facility_zone, throughput_rate, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) - 1 AS better_cnt FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY facility_zone, better_cnt LIMIT 12

WITH base AS (SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms, response_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL), error_base AS (SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms FROM base WHERE response_code >= 400), success_base AS (SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms FROM base WHERE response_code < 400) SELECT COALESCE(e.component_name, s.component_name) AS component_name, AVG(CAST(e.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_error_lat, AVG(CAST(s.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_success_lat, COUNT(e._timestamp) AS error_cnt, COUNT(s._timestamp) AS success_cnt FROM error_base e FULL OUTER JOIN success_base s ON e.component_name = s.component_name GROUP BY COALESCE(e.component_name, s.component_name) ORDER BY error_cnt DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}") SELECT facility_zone, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN pallet_id END) AS top_pallet, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN throughput_rate END) AS top_rate, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN throughput_rate END) AS second_rate, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate FROM ranked GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY top_rate DESC

SELECT component_name, cnt, avg_lat FROM (SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS cnt_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component_name) sub WHERE cnt_rank <= 5 ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT a.pallet_id, a.facility_zone, a.throughput_rate, a.throughput_rate / NULLIF((SELECT AVG(b.throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.facility_zone = a.facility_zone), 0) AS relative_rate FROM "{stream}" a ORDER BY relative_rate DESC LIMIT 10

WITH zone_records AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS record_cnt, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_rate, SUM(load_factor) AS total_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), mode_records AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS mode_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) SELECT zr.facility_zone, zr.record_cnt, zr.total_rate, mr.operation_mode, mr.mode_cnt FROM zone_records zr JOIN mode_records mr ON zr.facility_zone = mr.facility_zone ORDER BY zr.total_rate DESC LIMIT 12

WITH chunked AS (SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY _timestamp) AS time_chunk FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL) SELECT time_chunk, component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM chunked GROUP BY time_chunk, component_name ORDER BY time_chunk, cnt DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_rate FROM "{stream}" a WHERE a.throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(b.throughput_rate) * 0.5 FROM "{stream}" b WHERE b.facility_zone = a.facility_zone) GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY total_rate DESC LIMIT 10

WITH sub AS (SELECT component_name, region_code, latency_ms, response_code, CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_error FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL) SELECT component_name, region_code, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(is_error) AS errors, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, AVG(CASE WHEN is_error = 1 THEN CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT) END) AS avg_error_lat FROM sub GROUP BY component_name, region_code ORDER BY errors DESC, total DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT a.component_name, AVG(CAST(a.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, AVG(CAST(b.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat_stream2, (SELECT AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) FROM "{stream}") AS global_avg FROM "{stream}" a LEFT JOIN "{stream2}" b ON a.component_name = b.component_name AND a.region_code = b.region_code WHERE a.latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.component_name ORDER BY avg_lat DESC LIMIT 10

WITH agg AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), agg2 AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load FROM "{stream2}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT COALESCE(a.facility_zone, a2.facility_zone) AS zone, a.avg_rate, a2.avg_load FROM agg a FULL OUTER JOIN agg2 a2 ON a.facility_zone = a2.facility_zone ORDER BY zone

WITH base AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, operation_mode, throughput_rate, load_factor, cell_temp FROM "{stream}"), normalized AS (SELECT *, (throughput_rate - MIN(throughput_rate) OVER ()) / NULLIF(MAX(throughput_rate) OVER () - MIN(throughput_rate) OVER (), 0) AS norm_rate FROM base) SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, AVG(norm_rate) AS avg_norm_rate, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load, AVG(cell_temp) AS avg_temp FROM normalized GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY avg_norm_rate DESC
